# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      AssignPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Id

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b

  RoutingTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Route:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Id
      RouteTableId: !Ref RoutingTable

  NatGateways:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      AllocatePublicIpOnLaunch: true

  EIPs:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
    DependsOn: NatGateways

  NatInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-xxxxxxx # replace with your desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      KeyName: MyKeyPair # replace with your key pair name
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          service iptables stop
          service ip6tables stop
          iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -o eth0 -j SNAT --to-source $(curl http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/public-ipv4)
          iptables -A FORWARD -s 0.0.0.0/0 -o eth0 -j ACCEPT
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeleteOnTermination: false

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      MasterUsername: masteruser
      MasterUserPassword: password # replace with your desired password
      DatabaseName: dbname
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref RDS-SG
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      SkipFinalSnapshot: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref SubnetGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: RDS-SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RDS-InboundRule1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  SubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      DBSubnetGroupName: MyDBSubnetGroup

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Scheme: internet-facing
      SecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt NatInstance.SecurityGroups[0].Id
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      InternetFacing: true
      Type: application
